name: university-application-skill
description: Multiple-skill university application planning system with source-backed programme research, requirement audits, materials checks, writing studio, and submission readiness.

interface.shortDescription: Plan source-backed university applications and admissions writing workflows.
interface.longDescription: University Application Skill routes admissions requests into focused workflows for official programme research, hard requirement audits, materials readiness, interactive SOP and personal-statement planning, submission readiness, visa-sensitive notes, and programme table cleaning. It forbids admission-probability prediction and keeps requirements tied to official source evidence.
defaultPrompt: Build a source-backed shortlist for my target field.
Check the hard requirements for this programme.
Help me plan my personal statement with evidence before drafting.
